# [[claude|Claude]] Design

> AI Registry entry [AIR-80](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-80/claude-design) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-04-20. Departments: marketing.

**Category:** AI Design / Prototyping
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** Included with existing Claude subscriptions (Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise) during research preview
**Departments:** Marketing

## Overview

Research-preview product from Anthropic Labs. Create designs, interactive prototypes, slide decks, presentations through chat-and-canvas interface. Inherits org's design system. Exports to PDF/PPTX/Canva/HTML and direct handoff to [[claude-code|Claude Code]]. Available via Janus Sandbox Claude Team workspace.

## Key Capabilities

* Chat + canvas workflow — describe what you want, Claude renders/iterates
* **Design system inheritance** — auto-conforms to brand guidelines
* Prototype, slide deck, template modes
* Inline comments on canvas elements
* Version management — save branches
* Context attachments — upload screenshots, link code repos
* **Claude Code handoff** — send finished designs to local coding agent or Claude Code Web

## Integrations

* Canva — direct export
* Claude Code — handoff for code generation
* Code repositories — design grounded in existing codebase
* Export: .zip, PDF, PPTX, HTML

## Security

* Inherits Claude for Work posture (SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR)
* Research preview status — known limitations on inline comments, save errors, large repo linking

## Janus Relevance

No incremental licence cost (Janus already on Claude Team). For digital consultancy producing decks, mocks, prototypes — could shorten path from idea to reviewable artefact for non-designers in Marketing/Commercial/Product. Direct Claude Code handoff closes design-to-implementation loop.

## Considerations

* Research preview — feature stability not GA parity
* Design system prerequisite — quality hinges on configured design system; Janus doesn't yet have one loaded
* Usage counts against Claude subscription allowance
* Overlap with Canva, [[figma|Figma]], [[gamma|Gamma]] — clear POV needed
* Known limitations: inline comments, save errors, large repos

*Backlog. Functional tier. Marketing sandbox candidate.*
